offer: For independent insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient claims processing causes delayed settlements. We provide an analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient claims processing leads to delayed settlements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters

DM outreach to adjusters with demo video links

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for first users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing claims data
